title: Monitoring techniques as proactive tool in modern IPM
subtitle: Οι τεχνικές παρακολούθησης ως εργαλείο πρόληψης στα σύγχρονα IPM
description: A guide to using monitoring techniques as proactive tools within modern Integrated Pest Management systems. It outlines applications such as hyperspectral imaging, drone surveillance, pheromone traps, and decision support systems to enhance sustainable pest, disease, and weed management in vegetable production.
